data.raceComments: {"comment":"Tricky to assess, and the betting moves will be instructive. 1. BORDEAUX has been well educated but looked a run short at Pakenham on debut ($7 SP). This is easier, and the blinkers go straight on. Coffey sticks and will likely push forward. In a top barn, and this looks winnable with the extra fitness. 7. PURGATORIO debuts and is also in a leading metro barn. Has the inside barrier and won a recent Cranbourne jumpout. 10. FLASH INQUIRY debuts and just missed in a recent Caulfield Heath jumpout. Has an awkward barrier but looks to have good ability. 3. FAMOUS ROSY debuts with a win at the Ararat jumpouts under the saddle. As with the above pair, the betting should give us a good guide to his ability/readiness and that of the other debutants as well.","runners":[1,7,10,3],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: ECHUCA-R2-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
